data.description: US-ISRAEL AIRSTRIKE HIT IRAN'S QESHM ISLAND IN HORMUZ STRAIT - REPORTS
Commander-in-Chief of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps confirms the martyrdom of Major General Pasdar Jamshid Es-haqi, Advisor to the Chief of the General Staff of the Armed Forces - reports
IM Cannabis Reports 2025 Results: Revenue of C$54.7 Million with Over 134% Growth in Germany and Positive Operating Cash Flow

data.title: n6 Appoints Broad Institute Principal Investigator Aziz Al'Khafaji as Scientific Advisor, Advancing AutoNorm™ as the New Standard in NGS Library Preparation
data.description: A groundbreaking genomics expert and director of the Methods Development Lab has recently joined n6 with a focus on promoting the widespread use of AutoNorm in the research and clinical genomics sectors. Based in Pleasanton, California, this development took place on March 31, 2026. n6 Tec, Inc. (n6), known for creating icon96™, the premier tool in its category, has welcomed this key addition to their team to drive the adoption of AutoNorm.

data.title: Honda overhauls Flagship Pioneer 1000 platform for 2026
data.description: Honda has introduced three trim levels with drive modes and cruise control. The Pioneer 1000 Elite model stands out as the company's initial fully enclosed side-by-side vehicle and the first Honda side-by-side incorporating a factory-integrated HVAC system. This announcement was made in Alpharetta, Georgia, on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Koppers Holdings Publishes 2025 Annual Report
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Koppers Holdings Inc., a company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol KOP, released its 2025 Annual Report and Shareholder Letter. The company, known for its treated wood products, wood treatment chemicals, and carbon compounds, disclosed key financial and operational information in these documents. Investors and stakeholders can now access comprehensive details regarding the company's performance and strategic vision for the past year.

data.title: Tech North Atlanta Expands Signature TopGolf Classic in Partnership with Relevantz
data.description: Tech North Atlanta, a nonprofit organization in Alpharetta, revealed its plans to host an annual fundraiser on March 31, 2026, to support the growth of startups within its tech incubator. The event aims to bolster the tech and innovation ecosystem in north Atlanta. This initiative plays a crucial role in fostering the development of new businesses and entrepreneurs in the region. The fundraiser is expected to attract a significant turnout and raise vital funds for the organization's programs. It is an essential opportunity for supporters to contribute to the growth and success of startups, with the goal of expanding the reach and impact of the tech industry in the area.

data.title: McCormick to Combine with Unilever's Foods Business, Creating a Preeminent Global Flavor-Focused Company
data.description: The merger brings together complementary businesses with strong momentum, iconic brands, and shared strategic and cultural alignment. This move addresses the increasing consumer demand for a variety of flavors. The resulting company is growth-focused and resilient, benefitting from McCormick's history of successfully integrating iconic brands.

data.title: RO HELPS PATIENTS SAVE UP TO $1,200 PER YEAR ON WEGOVY® THROUGH COLLABORATION WITH NOVO NORDISK
data.description: The Wegovy® injectable and pill are now being offered at reduced cash pay rates on Ro. The direct-to-patient healthcare company, Ro, has revealed that patients can now enjoy savings of up to $1,200 annually on the Wegovy® pen and $600 annually on the Wegovy® pill. This initiative aims to make the medication more affordable and accessible to individuals seeking treatment.

data.title: Bitcoin maintained $66K amid reports of Trump choosing Iran war exit over reopening Hormuz; Analysts eye $90K in case of de-escalation.
data.description: As Bitcoin maintained a value of $66,000, reports indicated that Trump was considering a shift towards exiting a potential war with Iran. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation, predicting a possible increase in value to $90,000 if tensions de-escalate as anticipated.

data.title: Novo Nordisk launches first and only multi-month subscription program for FDA-approved Wegovy®, offering savings of up to $1,200/year
data.description: A novel subscription-based program has been introduced to assist eligible self-pay patients in accessing and continuing Wegovy® with set pricing. This service will be accessible starting on March 31, 2026, via platforms such as Ro, WeightWatchers, and LifeMD. Additionally, partnerships with Hims & Hers, Sesame, and various other telehealth providers are in the pipeline. This initiative expands on Novo Nordisk's offerings and aims to provide a more streamlined and affordable option for individuals seeking to utilize Wegovy®.

data.title: Magaya Named to Inbound Logistics 2026 Top 100 Logistics & Supply Chain Technology Providers
data.description: In Miami on March 31, 2026, Magaya Corporation was revealed to have earned a spot on the prestigious Inbound Logistics 2026 Top 100 Logistics & Supply Chain Technology Providers list. As a front-runner in freight management solutions catering to freight forwarders and customs brokers, this recognition is particularly significant for the company. This achievement signifies Magaya Corporation's sixth consecutive inclusion on the list, showcasing their continued excellence in the industry.

data.title: New Curaleaf Branded Dispensary Opens in Lorain, Ohio, in Partnership with RC Retail
data.description: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global supplier of cannabis products, has revealed the opening of a new store in Lorain, Ohio. This marks the establishment of their 164th retail location across the United States. The company announced this significant milestone on March 31, 2026, from their headquarters in Stamford, Connecticut. Curaleaf's presence now extends to a total of 164 retail outlets nationwide, showcasing their continued growth and expansion in the cannabis industry.

data.title: SmallRig and vivo Launch Integrated Mobile Imaging Solution, Expanding the Boundaries of Mobile Content Creation
data.description: SmallRig and vivo have joined forces to launch the Pro Video Rig Kit alongside the vivo X300 Ultra in a global debut. The product will be available worldwide through vivo retail outlets, with exclusive early access granted to numerous media outlets and creators. This collaboration was unveiled in Shenzhen, China on March 31, 2026.
Qatar MOD: 'Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of State for Defense Affairs Meets with the British Secretary of State for Defense'

data.title: Capitolis UK Approved to Operate an Organized Trading Facility (OTF) by the FCA
data.description: Capitolis, a financial technology company, revealed today that its subsidiary, Capitolis UK Limited, has been granted regulatory approval to function as an Organized Trading Facility (OTF) by the UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) on February 10, 2026. This approval also permits the subsidiary to operate as an investment firm. Furthermore, on March 24, 2026, Capitolis received additional approval from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission.

data.title: Weight Watchers Announces Best in Market Self-Pay Wegovy® Pricing for Med+ Members and the Launch of Preferred Subscription Pricing for Wegovy via NovoCare®
data.description: An enhanced partnership with Novo Nordisk offers eligible Med+ members the opportunity to save up to $1,200 annually on Wegovy®, a FDA-approved GLP-1 treatment. This collaboration aims to improve access to affordable healthcare, utilizing Weight Watchers’ integrated care platform for comprehensive support.

data.title: Axios npm releases compromised: axios@1.14.1 and 0.30.4 flagged. Users advised to rotate keys and rollback affected packages.
data.description: Security experts have identified axios versions 1.14.1 and 0.30.4 as compromised. They are advising users to rotate their credentials and roll back any packages that have been affected by these compromised versions. It is crucial for users to take immediate action to ensure the security of their systems.

data.title: Latch (Now DOOR) Files 2025 Annual Report and Provides Financial Update
data.description: DOOR, formerly known as Latch, Inc., reported a 24% year-over-year increase in total revenue. The company, based in St. Louis, disclosed this information as it filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ending December 31, 2025.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Announces Reverse Stock Split
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc., a pharmaceutical company focusing on targeted radiotherapeutics for central nervous system cancers, announced a 1-for-25 reverse stock split approved by its Board of Directors. Effective from April 2, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time, the Company's common stock will start trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "PSTV" post-split. Additionally, a new CUSIP number, 72941H806, will be assigned to the stock.
